data.title: RED: Write failing tests for template registry parser
data.description:
## Description

Create `tests/scripts/test-parse-template-registry.sh` with 8 behavioral tests that FAIL (RED) because the parser script doesn't exist yet.

### Test Specifications

Each test creates a fixture YAML in a temp dir, runs the parser, and asserts on exit code + stdout/stderr:

1. `test_parser_returns_all_templates` — 4 valid entries, asserts stdout has 4 lines
2. `test_parser_outputs_correct_columns` — 4 valid entries, pipes through `cut -f1,3,4` on first line, asserts specific values (name, install_method, framework_type) confirming tab-separation and column order
3. `test_parser_outputs_data_flags_column` — fixture with `required_data_flags: [org, app_name]`, asserts fifth tab-separated column contains "org,app_name" (comma-joined)
4. `test_parser_validates_required_fields` — fixture missing `repo_url`, asserts non-zero exit + stderr "missing required field"
5. `test_parser_allowlists_install_method` — fixture with `install_method: docker`, asserts non-zero exit + stderr "invalid install_method"
6. `test_parser_detects_unknown_keys` — fixture with `instal_method: git-clone` (typo), asserts warning in stderr "unknown key"
7. `test_parser_handles_missing_file` — runs on `/nonexistent.yaml`, asserts exit 0, empty stdout, stderr warning
8. `test_parser_handles_malformed_yaml` — invalid YAML syntax, asserts exit 0, empty stdout, stderr warning

### File Impact
- CREATE: `tests/scripts/test-parse-template-registry.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-parse-template-registry.sh
- [ ] Test syntax valid
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-parse-template-registry.sh
- [ ] At least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_\|--- test_" tests/scripts/test-parse-template-registry.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-parse-template-registry.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] `.test-index` entry added
  Verify: grep -q 'parse-template-registry' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
